scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @psstore/shared run lint && pnpm --filter @psstore/server run lint && pnpm --filter @psstore/client run lint && pnpm --filter @psstore/sony-contract-bot run lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @psstore/shared run build && pnpm --filter @psstore/server run typecheck && pnpm --filter @psstore/client run typecheck && pnpm --filter @psstore/sony-contract-bot run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @psstore/shared run test && pnpm --filter @psstore/server run test && pnpm --filter @psstore/client run test && pnpm --filter @psstore/sony-contract-bot run test
scripts.test-all: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run test
scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm --filter @psstore/shared run build && pnpm --filter @psstore/client run build && pnpm --filter @psstore/server run build && pnpm --filter @psstore/sony-contract-bot run build
scripts.clean: rm -rf build client/build server/dist shared/dist tools/sony-contract-bot/dist
